title: Spud Gun
description: Shoot and blow up your friends with potatoes!
body:
If you like potatoes and blowing stuff up this mod is a great addition to your mods folder.
This mod allows you to make potato cannons and exploding potatoes!
Loaded potatoes make an explosion 4x bigger than regular tnt and you can shoot them from the spud gun upwards of 200 blocks.
Shoot them from the spud sniper and the loaded potatoes will travel 400+ blocks!
Eat the loaded potatoes and make an explosion that doesnt break any blocks and doesn't harm you yet it will still one hit mobs and even your friends!(_if you have any_)
The Spud Machine Gun will fire spuds at your enemies and mobs 8 shots every second!
Poisionous potatoes give poison effect.
---NEW---
Improved Spud Gun firing animation.
